name: Potroasted Kid, Locarno Style (Capretto Alla Locarnese)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into bite-sized pieces.
2. Sprinkle the meat with the salt and pepper.
3. Heat the butter in a casserole.
4. Add the sage, juniper berries, (chilies), mint, cinnamon, and nutmeg to the butter.
5. Cook, stirring constantly, for 3 minutes.
6. Add the meat and brown on all sides.
7. Lower the heat and add wine.
8. Simmer, covered, until the meat is tender (it took me a little more than an hour with the kid I had).
9. Remove the meat and keep warm.
10. Strain the sauce.
11. Put the sauce back in the casserole.
12. Stir in the cream and rum.
13. Bring to a boil and reduce to the consistency of heavy cream.
14. Return the meat to the sauce and heat through.
15. Serve with dry boiled rice and green peas (or wide homemade egg noodles).
